Membership

MENU

O’SIG provides 1 year membership

• Membership will be extended every year if the student is still competent

• Students who complete the following requirements are eligible to apply for O’SIG membership

Be a current student in Faculty of medicine

Turkish language proficiency

At least 2 Recommendation letter from faculty instructor

No records of disciplinary issues

Membership cancelation

Membership may be cancelled for any of the following reasons

Static decrease in grades

Disciplinary issues

Negative evaluation of the attending surgeon

Student who is no longer interested

Attendance shortage (University)

For further information please contact :

osig@okan.edu.tr

Click for our Instagram page.
